difficulty_definitions.L1: Single LLM step over a single financial input (statement / CSV).
difficulty_definitions.L3: Persistent state across runs, alerts, rebalancing logic.

coverage_status.finance-workflow: v1 seed — 3 entries (2026-05-20) covering expense tracker / P&L compiler / portfolio. Phase WX-K.7 backfill. aiwizard-finance-workflow.json recipe has 5 layers including the finance-workflows-pack (~10-15KB total).

entries.goal: Weekly expense tracker workflow with category auto-tagging: import a CSV bank statement, categorize transactions (groceries/dining/transport/etc), output a markdown summary by category.
entries.notes: Authored as a `pipeline` artifact (existing default recipe). Future `finance-workflow` recipe routing would migrate this entry to artifact_type=finance-workflow once the wizard can pick that recipe directly.

entries.goal: Monthly P&L compiler from CSV exports of my bank statements: pull last month's transactions, categorize, compute revenue minus expenses by category, output markdown table.
Stock portfolio tracking workflow: read holdings from a Google Sheet, fetch current prices, compute drift from target allocation, alert if any position drifts >5% from target.
